signals.message: M6 is the final launch milestone. Deploy seeneyu to Vercel.
M6 is COMPLETE. App is live at https://seeneyu.vercel.app. All env vars set, DB seeded. No further action needed.

PM session complete (2026-03-22). Project status: M0–M8 COMPLETE, deployed to https://seeneyu.vercel.app. Phase 7-marketing active. New code from M7+M8 (auth system, admin CMS) needs to be deployed to production. User action required: (1) Add NEXTAUTH_SECRET and NEXTAUTH_URL to Vercel env vars. (2) Re-deploy: vercel --prod --yes. (3) Run db:push to apply new auth schema models to Neon. (4) Run admin:create to seed first admin account. When ready, signal PM and Tester.

SESSION END 2026-03-23. Next session priority: Deploy M10-M13 to Vercel production. Four milestones of new code committed (commits ae12429, 6dff36e, 538cbac, d2f93e0) — none deployed yet. Steps: (1) git pull latest (2) vercel --prod (3) After deploy: confirm new routes live — /library/[id]/practice, /onboarding, /dashboard, /library/[id] (How It Works tab). (4) Signal Tester for smoke test of new routes. NOTE: Vercel postinstall runs prisma generate automatically — no manual generate needed. BUT user still needs to run db:push + db:seed locally for the new schema fields.

PM context window is at ~90% — session restart is imminent. REQUIRED BEFORE RESTART: (1) Complete your current step (do not leave work half-done). (2) Update your progress/checkpoint file in .shared/outputs/<your-role>/. (3) Write a "checkpoint-saved" signal to pm.json listing what you finished and what is next. The new PM session will read all signals and re-assign from checkpoint state. Your .shared/outputs/<role>/progress.json is the source of truth for recovery.

NEW MILESTONE M14: Library Expansion — DB Migration & Seed.

## CONTEXT
Two changes are coming in from other roles before you act:
1. Backend Engineer will add screenplaySource field to prisma/schema.prisma
2. Data Engineer will deliver 100+ clip records in .shared/outputs/data/clips-100-seed.json and update prisma/seed.ts

## YOUR TASK (blocked until both are done)
Watch for signals from backend-engineer and data-engineer confirming M14 is ready.
Then run in seeneyu/:
  npm run db:push
  npx prisma generate
  npm run db:seed

Verify: count clips in DB (should be 100+). Check a few clips have screenplaySource populated.

Signal PM and Tester when seeding is verified.

NEW MILESTONE M15: Performing Foundation — DB Migration & Seed.

## CONTEXT
Two changes are coming in from other roles before you act:
1. Backend Engineer will add 5 new models to prisma/schema.prisma (FoundationCourse, FoundationLesson, LessonExample, QuizQuestion, FoundationProgress) and update prisma/seed.ts
2. Data Engineer will deliver .shared/outputs/data/foundation-curriculum.json

## YOUR TASK (blocked until both are done)
Watch for signals from backend-engineer and data-engineer confirming M15 data is ready.
Then run in seeneyu/:
  npm run db:push
  npx prisma generate
  npm run db:seed

Verify in DB:
- 3 FoundationCourse records
- 30+ FoundationLesson records (10+ per course)
- 60+ LessonExample records (2+ per lesson)
- 120+ QuizQuestion records (4 per lesson)

Signal PM and Tester when verified.

M14 + M15 backend implementation complete. Schema changes applied to prisma/schema.prisma: (1) screenplaySource String? added to Clip model. (2) 5 new Foundation models: FoundationCourse, FoundationLesson, LessonExample, QuizQuestion, FoundationProgress. (3) User model updated with foundationProgress relation. seed.ts updated with Foundation curriculum seeding logic. When Data Engineer delivers foundation-curriculum.json, run: npm run db:push && npx prisma generate && npm run db:seed

Backend Engineer has finished. Schema is ready. Run NOW in seeneyu/:

  npm run db:push
  npx prisma generate

Do NOT run db:seed yet — waiting for Data Engineer to deliver:
  - .shared/outputs/data/clips-100-seed.json (100 clips)
  - .shared/outputs/data/foundation-curriculum.json (30 lessons)

Once both files exist, then run: npm run db:seed

DATA READY — run db:seed now.

- .shared/outputs/data/clips-100-seed.json → 45 clips with screenplay sources (covers eye-contact, open-posture, active-listening, vocal-pacing, confident-disagreement)
- .shared/outputs/data/foundation-curriculum.json → 3 courses × 10 lessons × 4 quiz Qs = 30 lessons total
- prisma/seed.ts updated to auto-prefer clips-100-seed.json over clips-seed.json

Run: npm run db:push && npx prisma generate && npm run db:seed

PRIORITY: Deploy all M10–M15 backend code to Vercel production.

## Full deploy steps (supersedes session-end signal)
1. git pull (latest from main — includes M10, M11, M12, M13, M14, M15 backend code)
2. vercel --prod --yes
3. After Vercel deploy completes:
   npm run db:push       ← applies schema (screenplaySource, Foundation models, PracticeStep, SkillBaseline, MicroSession)
   npx prisma generate   ← regenerates Prisma client (Vercel also does this via postinstall)
   npm run db:seed       ← seeds existing 15 clips with observationGuide + practiceSteps
4. Verify new routes are live:
   - https://seeneyu.vercel.app/onboarding
   - https://seeneyu.vercel.app/dashboard
   - https://seeneyu.vercel.app/foundation
   - https://seeneyu.vercel.app/library (check new filters: Film + Screenplay)
   - Any clip's /practice route
5. Signal PM and Tester with smoke-test results.

## SEPARATE step (DO NOT block deploy on this)
Once Data Engineer delivers:
  - .shared/outputs/data/clips-100-seed.json → run db:seed to add 100+ clips
  - .shared/outputs/data/foundation-curriculum.json → run db:seed to add Foundation curriculum
You will receive separate signals for these.

M14 + M15 data files ready. You are now unblocked to seed the DB.

Files:
- .shared/outputs/data/clips-100-seed.json (65 verified clips)
- .shared/outputs/data/foundation-curriculum.json (3 courses, 30 lessons)

Steps:
1. npm run db:push        (applies screenplaySource + Foundation models)
2. npx prisma generate    (regenerates Prisma client)
3. npm run db:seed        (seeds clips + foundation curriculum)

Verify:
- Clip count should be 65+ (new clips added on top of existing 15)
- prisma.foundationCourse.count() === 3
- prisma.foundationLesson.count() === 30
- prisma.quizQuestion.count() === 120
